chunks: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog. Wait—did you really say we have to leave now? I can’t believe it!
Peter Piper picked a peck of pickled peppers, while the majestic ships sailed quietly across the shimmering bay. She ordered exactly 73 widgets for $24.50 each, totaling $1,788.50 on July 17th.
